info.name: Tahadaw - Full System Flows (step by step, all features)
info.description:
End-to-end test collection covering EVERY flow in the Tahadaw API.

Each top-level folder is ONE self-contained flow with numbered steps. Run them top-to-bottom: every step stores the IDs it creates into collection variables, so later flows automatically reuse userId / recipientId / giftPlanId / etc.

BASE URL: set {{base_url}} (default http://localhost:8080).

DEPENDENCIES (some flows need external config in application-local.properties):
  - AI flows (recommendations, AI messages, surprise plan, quality check) need openai.api.key
  - Premium flow needs moyasar.api.key (sk_test_...) + ONE manual 3-D Secure browser approval
  - Email steps need spring.mail.* (Gmail App Password)
  - Product search needs searchapi.api.key

PREMIUM GATING: only 'Flow 08 - Gift Card' and 'Flow 09 - Surprise Plan' require the user to be premium. Run 'Flow 02 - Premium Upgrade' first for those (or seed a premium user and set {{userId}} manually).

RECOMMENDED ORDER:
  01 Account & Recipient  ->  02 Premium  ->  03 Gift Plan & Required Questions  ->
  04 AI Helper Questions  ->  05 AI Recommendations  ->  06 Product Search & Selection  ->
  07 Gift Messages  ->  08 Gift Card  ->  09 Surprise Plan  ->  10 Group Gift  ->
  11 Gift Quality Check  ->  12 Reminders  ->  13 Notifications  ->  14 Gift History  ->  15 QR Code

Independent flows (10-13, 15) only need a user (and a recipient for 10-12) so they can run right after Flow 01.

item.name: Flow 01 - Account & Recipient Setup
item.description: Foundation flow. Creates a fresh user and a recipient, then reads/updates them. No premium / AI / external keys needed. Produces {{userId}} and {{recipientId}} used by every other flow.

exec: let b = {}; try { b = pm.response.json(); } catch(e) {}

body.raw:
{
  "name": "{{recipientName}}",
  "relationship": "sister",
  "age": 24,
  "gender": "female",
  "interests": "reading, specialty coffee, travel",
  "hobbies": "photography, journaling",
  "favoriteColors": "sage green, beige",
  "favoriteBrands": "Apple, MUJI, Aesop",
  "dislikes": "strong perfumes, clutter",
  "personalityStyle": "thoughtful, minimalist",
  "sizeInfo": "Clothing M, ring size 7",
  "notes": "Just graduated from King Saud University with a CS degree."
}

{
  "name": "{{recipientName}}",
  "relationship": "sister",
  "age": 25,
  "gender": "female",
  "interests": "reading, specialty coffee, travel, film photography",
  "hobbies": "photography, journaling, hiking",
  "favoriteColors": "sage green, beige",
  "favoriteBrands": "Apple, MUJI, Aesop",
  "dislikes": "strong perfumes, clutter",
  "personalityStyle": "thoughtful, minimalist",
  "sizeInfo": "Clothing M, ring size 7",
  "notes": "Started her first job as a backend engineer."
}

item.name: 8. List Recipient Gift History (empty at first)
Flow 02 - Premium Upgrade (Moyasar)
item.description:
Upgrades {{userId}} to premium via a Moyasar sandbox card payment.

MANUAL STEP: step 1 returns a 3-D Secure URL (printed in Console as 3DS_URL). Open it in a browser, approve the sandbox payment, THEN run step 2 to flip it to PAID and activate premium. Needs moyasar.api.key in config.

exec: else if (p.transactionUrl) { console.log('======= 3DS_URL (open, approve, then run step 2) ======='); console.log(p.transactionUrl); console.log('========================================================'); }
else { console.warn('No transaction_url. Check Moyasar key:', JSON.stringify(p)); }
if (p.status !== 'PAID') console.warn('Not PAID yet. Approve the 3DS_URL from step 1, then re-run.');
let b = {}; try { b = pm.response.json(); } catch(e) {}
const isPremium = b.premium === true || b.isPremium === true;

item.name: Flow 03 - Gift Plan & Required Questions
item.description: Creates a gift plan for the recipient, then walks the required-question / answer cycle. Adds one required question (admin), lists active questions for the plan, submits an answer, and lists answers. Produces {{giftPlanId}}.

exec: if (plan && plan.id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('giftPlanId', plan.id); console.log('giftPlanId =', plan.id); }
let list = []; try { list = pm.response.json(); } catch(e) {}
// The submit endpoint requires an answer for EVERY active question, so answer them all.
const canned = 'Around 500 SAR, something practical she will use daily.';
const answers = list.map(q => ({ requiredQuestionId: q.id, answerText: canned }));

request.description: Body is built dynamically by the previous step ({{requiredAnswersBody}}) so it answers EVERY active required question.

item.name: Flow 04 - AI Helper Questions & Answers
item.description: The AI clarifying-question cycle that enriches the recommendation context. Step 1 calls OpenAI to GENERATE 3-5 follow-up questions for the gift plan; step 2 lists them; step 3 answers them; step 4 lists answers. Needs openai.api.key, and the plan must NOT already have AI questions (the service rejects a second generation).

exec: pm.test('At least one AI question', () => pm.expect(arr.length).to.be.above(0));

request.description: Calls OpenAI to generate 3-5 Arabic follow-up questions from the recipient + occasion + required answers, saves them to the plan, and returns them. Fails if questions were already generated for this plan.

item.name: 2. List AI Questions for Plan (build answers)

exec: let list = []; try { list = pm.response.json(); } catch(e) {}
// The submit endpoint requires an answer for EVERY generated question, so build them all.
const canned = 'She would love that — it fits her taste and her photography hobby perfectly.';
const answers = list.map(q => ({ aiGeneratedQuestionId: q.id, answerText: canned }));

request.description: Body is built dynamically by the previous step ({{aiAnswersBody}}) so it answers EVERY AI-generated question, which the endpoint requires.

item.name: Flow 05 - AI Gift Recommendations
item.description: AI generates 3-5 gift ideas from the recipient + occasion + answers, then you select one. Needs openai.api.key. Produces {{recommendationId}} (required by product search).

exec: if (arr.length) { pm.collectionVariables.set('recommendationId', arr[0].id); console.log('recommendationId =', arr[0].id, '| name =', arr[0].productName); }

item.name: Flow 06 - Product Search & Selection
item.description: Searches real products (Google Shopping via SearchAPI.io) for the SELECTED gift idea, then locks one product in. Needs searchapi.api.key AND a selected recommendation from Flow 05. Produces {{selectedProductId}} (used by Gift History).

item.name: Flow 07 - Gift Messages
item.description: Two ways to make the card message: AI-generated (warm Arabic) and user-written. Produces {{giftMessageId}} used by the gift card. Requires a SELECTED recommendation (Flow 05); AI generation needs openai.api.key.

item.name: Flow 08 - Gift Card (PREMIUM)
item.description: Builds the branded gift card from the AI message + a YouTube link (encoded as a QR). Creating it AUTO-SENDS the rendered PNG to the owner / sentToEmail. REQUIRES premium (run Flow 02) and a {{giftMessageId}} (Flow 07). Email steps need spring.mail.*.

exec: if (card && card.id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('giftCardId', card.id); console.log('giftCardId =', card.id, '| status =', card.status); }

item.name: Flow 09 - Surprise Plan (PREMIUM, AI)
item.description: AI builds a step-by-step surprise delivery plan for the gift, with manual edit, regenerate, and delete. REQUIRES premium (Flow 02) + openai.api.key.

item.name: Flow 10 - Group Gift
item.description: Full CRUD for a group (collaborative) gift tied to the recipient. Only needs {{userId}} + {{recipientId}} (Flow 01). Produces {{groupGiftId}}.

exec: if (g && g.id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('groupGiftId', g.id); console.log('groupGiftId =', g.id); }

body.raw:
{
  "recipientId": {{recipientId}},
  "title": "Layla's Graduation Gift Pool",
  "description": "Let's chip in for a DSLR camera for Layla's graduation.",
  "responsiblePersonName": "Sara AlQahtani",
  "responsiblePersonEmail": "sara.organizer@example.com",
  "giftGivingDate": "2026-09-15",
  "votingDeadline": "2026-09-10T20:00:00"
}

item.name: Flow 11 - Gift Quality Check (AI)
item.description: AI rates whether a specific gift idea suits the recipient (suitability, strengths, weaknesses, advice). Needs {{userId}} + {{recipientId}} and openai.api.key. The run endpoint returns only a message, so step 2 lists checks to capture {{qualityCheckId}}.

item.name: Flow 12 - Reminders
item.description: CRUD for occasion reminders tied to the recipient. Needs {{userId}} + {{recipientId}} (Flow 01). Produces {{reminderId}}.

item.name: Flow 13 - Notifications
item.description: CRUD for in-app notifications. Only needs {{userId}} (Flow 01). Produces {{notificationId}}.

item.name: Flow 14 - Gift History
item.description: Logs the outcome of an actually-selected product (was it gifted, rating, notes) and reads back history + spending summary. REQUIRES {{selectedProductId}} from Flow 06.

item.name: Flow 15 - QR Code
item.description: Standalone utility: turns any URL into a QR code (same engine used on the gift card). No dependencies.
